_comment: Active Project Lanes. state: active | frozen | parked | merged | blocked. Keep one entry per major project/repo. statusLabel is free text shown as a chip.

items.name: Devbiz /lab hub foundation
items.lastOwnerAction: Merged PR #24 (Studio Lab hub + Aether Wing placeholder)
items.nextAction: Configure Cloudflare Access for /lab/* before sharing any deployed link
items.notes: Private gated /lab hub with Coverage, Token Analyzer, Scribe cards. Cloudflare Access gates externally; local dev open.

items.name: Mission Control (this dashboard)
items.lastOwnerAction: Owner froze all new feature/game lanes until Mission Control v1 exists
items.notes: Data-driven dashboard at /lab/mission-control. Renders from data/*.json so future agents update the registry, not the UI.

items.name: FRONTIER: Aether Wing
items.lastOwnerAction: Decided Aether Wing is NOT built in Devbiz; goes in the frontier-al Vite/TS/Three.js scaffold
items.nextAction: Owner confirms the correct frontier-al folder/repo before any gameplay build
items.notes: No wallet/blockchain/account systems in Phase 1. Devbiz only holds the gated placeholder route, not the game.

items.name: GrowVerse plant review panel
items.lastOwnerAction: Reported: PR #27 opened for the plant review panel
items.nextAction: Owner reviews CI + visual on PR #27 (cross-repo; status here is reported, not verified from devbiz)
items.notes: Tracked here for visibility only. Mission Control cannot read the GrowVerse repo from this session — treat as reported status.

items.name: Frontier / frontier-al scaffold
items.nextAction: Owner confirms folder/repo location before scaffold work begins
items.notes: Blocking dependency for Aether Wing Phase 1. No work starts until the folder/repo is confirmed.

items.name: Studio Lab tools (Coverage · Token Analyzer · Scribe)
items.lastOwnerAction: Merged the three tools; surfaced as cards in /lab
items.notes: Coverage Dashboard (read-only), Token Analyzer (local), Kudbee Scribe (client-side default). All reachable from the /lab hub.
